title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates!
